commands.title: Inspect
commands.description: Plugin identity, all capabilities, 41-command surface, feature list, and health check.

commands.title: Scatter
commands.description: Deterministic Poisson-disc scatter over rectangular area with slope/height filters, align-to-normal, random rotation/scale. Returns instances + mesh summary for PluginMeshResult 3D preview.

commands.title: Paint Brush
commands.description: Brush paint: Poisson-disc placement constrained to a circular brush at world position. Existing instances preserved.

commands.title: Erase Brush
commands.description: Brush erase: remove all instances within brush radius. Supports storeKey for stateful operation.

commands.title: List Types
commands.description: List all registered FoliageType definitions with their parameters.

commands.title: Add Type
commands.description: Create or update a FoliageType from JSON (name, density, scaleRange, slopeMax, seed, meshId, etc.).

commands.title: Generate Mesh
commands.description: Scatter and generate per-cluster vertex/index arrays. Returns vertex/index counts and cluster layout for PluginMeshResult.

commands.title: Reapply Filters
commands.description: Reapply FoliageType properties: re-check height/slope filters, re-apply align-to-normal. Like UE's Reapply tool.

commands.title: Fill Area
commands.description: Multi-pass auto-fill: fills gaps in existing scatter with increasing density per pass. Converges when no more gaps remain.

commands.title: Ecosystem Sim
commands.description: Ecosystem simulation: age instances, spread seeds, run competition (collision radius, shade radius, overlap priority). Like UE's ProceduralFoliageSimulation.

commands.title: Spatial Query
commands.description: Spatial query: nearest-neighbour, radius search, or density count at world position. Uses grid-hash spatial index.

commands.title: Place Single
commands.description: Place exactly one instance at a specific world position. Filters are checked; rejected if out of bounds.

commands.title: Remove Instances
commands.description: Remove instances by index list, radius brush, height range, or slope filter. Supports storeKey.

commands.title: Analyze Store
commands.description: Statistical analysis: mean/std position, scale distribution, height histogram, density grid, nearest-neighbour stats, Clark-Evans index.

commands.title: Export State
commands.description: Export full plugin state (all FoliageTypes + instance stores) to a JSON file on disk.

commands.title: Import State
commands.description: Import full plugin state from a previously exported JSON file.

commands.title: Density Falloff
commands.description: Apply density falloff (edge feathering): probabilistically remove instances near area boundaries. Supports linear, smoothstep, sqrt, inverse curves.

commands.title: Layer Mask
commands.description: Set inclusion/exclusion layer masks and filter instances by them. Replicates UE LandscapeLayers / ExclusionLayers.

commands.title: Noise Modulate
commands.description: Apply Perlin/FBM/ridged noise density modulation. Octaves, lacunarity, gain, threshold, power curve. Probabilistic threshold with soft transition zone.

commands.title: Z Offset
commands.description: Set or apply random vertical offset range (per FoliageType). Replicates UE's Z Offset Min/Max.

commands.title: Cull Distance
commands.description: Set or get start/end cull distance per FoliageType. Replicates UE's CullDistance Min/Max.

commands.title: Batch Execute
commands.description: Execute multiple sub-commands in a single call. Supports scatter/paint/noise_modulate/analyze/fill/simulate. Results returned per-command.

commands.title: Checkpoint
commands.description: Save/restore/clear instance snapshots for undo/redo. Each checkpoint is a full JSON serialization of the store.

commands.title: Merge Stores
commands.description: Merge multiple instance stores (by sourceKeys) into a single target store.

commands.title: Mirror Region
commands.description: Copy/move instances from one rectangular region to another with optional mirrorX, mirrorZ, or 90° rotation.

commands.title: Exclusion Zone
commands.description: Add/remove/query circle or rectangle blocking volumes with soft edge falloff. Invert for inclusion zones.

commands.title: Presets
commands.description: Save/load/delete/list named scatter presets (area dimensions, type list, density multiplier, slope max).

commands.title: Benchmark
commands.description: Measure scatter performance over multiple runs. Reports best/avg time, instances/ms, total instances. Uses QueryPerformanceCounter.

commands.title: Sample Terrain
commands.description: Bulk-sample terrain height, slope, and normal at single points or N×N grid over an area.

commands.title: Biome Scatter
commands.description: Multi-zone scatter with height/slope-based FoliageType assignment. Smooth blending at zone boundaries via smoothstep transition.

commands.title: Radial Scatter
commands.description: Radial placement: concentric rings or full disc with configurable inner/outer radius and ring count.

commands.title: Along Path
commands.description: Scatter instances along a polyline/spline with configurable width, density, parallel alignment, and cross-track spread.

commands.title: Natural Clumps
commands.description: Thomas cluster process (Matern): Poisson-disc parents + Gaussian-distributed children. Center children are larger (sizeBonus).

commands.title: Brush Shapes
commands.description: Paint with different brush footprints: Circle, Square, Donut, Line, Gaussian. Each shape has its own geometric parameters.

commands.title: Random Replace
commands.description: Replace a random percentage of instances with alternative FoliageTypes for natural forest variation.

commands.title: Filter By Type
commands.description: Keep or remove instances by scale range (proxy for FoliageType). Useful before merge/export.

commands.title: Transform Instances
commands.description: Bulk translate (X/Y/Z), rotate (yaw), and scale (uniform/per-axis) on all input instances. Optional yaw randomization.

commands.title: Wind Parameters
commands.description: Set/get wind animation parameters per FoliageType: strength, sway amount, leaf flutter, gust frequency.

commands.title: Collision Settings
commands.description: Set/get collision preset per FoliageType: NoCollision, BlockAll, OverlapAll, BlockAllDynamic, OverlapAllDynamic.

commands.title: LOD Config
commands.description: Set/get LOD distances (LOD0/1/2, billboard) and impostor usage per FoliageType.

commands.title: Grouped Statistics
commands.description: Grouped statistics: instance count and average scale per height band and slope band. Useful for biome tuning.

commands.title: List Commands
commands.description: Return canonical command registry with all 43 plugin commands and their metadata.

commands.title: Health Check
commands.description: Deep self-test: schemas, registry size, handler count, types loaded, active stores, checkpoints, limits.

commands.title: Multi-Type Scatter
commands.description: Weighted multi-type scatter: provide [{name, weight}] array, scatters each type proportionally into one store. Like UE PCG Weighted Index.

commands.title: Select Instances
commands.description: Select instances by radius, bounding box, or type filter. Returns hit indices for use with transform/remove commands.

commands.title: Clear Store
commands.description: Clear entire instance store. Dry-run reports count without deleting. Requires confirm for actual deletion.

commands.title: Duplicate Store
commands.description: Deep-copy one instance store to a new key. Useful for branching/experimentation.

commands.title: Compact Store
commands.description: Rebuild spatial layout: compute bounds, cluster count, and total area for an instance store.

commands.title: Reseed Instances
commands.description: Re-randomize scale and rotation of existing instances with a new seed. Positions stay unchanged. Useful for exploring variation.

commands.title: Validate Payload
commands.description: Validate JSON payload against command schema without executing. Reports parse errors and schema availability.

commands.title: Diff Stores
commands.description: Compare two instance stores: reports added, removed, and total counts. Foundation for incremental operations.

commands.title: Export Engine
commands.description: Export as PluginMeshResult-compatible JSON for 3D viewport preview.

commands.title: Density Heatmap
commands.description: 2D density grid: instance counts per cell. Configurable cell size for coverage analysis.

commands.title: Compute Bounds
commands.description: Compute precise spatial bounds (min/max X,Y,Z), center, size, area, and volume of an instance store.

commands.title: Auto LOD
commands.description: Get recommended LOD distances per importance class (grass/bush/tree/rock/decor). Applies to store if storeKey given.

commands.title: Group By Cluster
commands.description: Per-cluster statistics: count, avg height, avg scale for each spatial cluster cell.

commands.title: Jitter Positions
commands.description: Randomly jitter instance XZ positions within maxJitter range. Respects terrain filters. Adds natural variation without full rescatter.

commands.title: Export CSV
commands.description: Export instances as CSV: x,y,z,nx,ny,nz,scaleX,scaleY,scaleZ,yaw. Importable into Blender, Houdini, or spreadsheet.

commands.title: Snap To Terrain
commands.description: Re-snap all instances to terrain surface. Updates height and normal. Like UE's End key reattachment.

commands.title: Remove Outliers
commands.description: Remove statistical height outliers. Filter by sigma threshold from mean height. Useful for cleaning scatter artifacts.

commands.title: Coverage Analysis
commands.description: Area coverage metrics: % covered cells, empty patches, max/avg instances per cell. Grid-based with configurable cell size.

commands.title: Composable Pipeline
commands.description: Execute a sequence of commands in pipeline. Each step feeds into the next via shared storeKey. cmd_0/payload_0, cmd_1/payload_1 pattern.

commands.title: Store Memory
commands.description: Estimate memory usage for instance stores, checkpoints, types, zones, and presets. Returns bytes/KB/MB breakdown.
